system_description: Keyplay provides AI-powered solutions for B2B sales and marketing teams to identify and prioritize their ideal customer profiles (ICPs). Keyplay's platform integrates with CRM systems like Salesforce and HubSpot to automate account research, scoring, and segmentation. By leveraging AI-driven signals and lookalike modeling, Keyplay enables businesses to focus on high-potential accounts, enhancing the efficiency of their go-to-market strategies
